name: Sauteed Chicken Breasts
recipeIngredient: 4 Chicken breast halves - skinless and boneless
recipeInstructions:
1. On waxed paper, combine the flour and pepper and coat the chicken with it.
2. In a skillet, heat the vegetable oil over medium-high heat. Cook the chicken for 10 minutes or until browned, removing and setting aside (spoon off the fat).
3. In another skillet, combine the soup and water, heating to boiling. Return the chicken to the skillet, cover, and cook over low heat for 5 minutes or until no longer pink, stirring often.
4. Serve over hot cooked noodles garnished with fresh basil and parmesan cheese.
